business-name-generator.question: How are business names generated?
business-name-generator.answer: The generator combines keywords, industry terms, and creative patterns to produce unique, catchy business name suggestions instantly.

business-name-generator.question: Can I generate names for a specific industry?
business-name-generator.answer: Yes, you can specify keywords related to your industry or brand to get more relevant and targeted name suggestions.

business-name-generator.question: Are my business ideas private?
business-name-generator.answer: Yes. All name generation happens client-side. Your keywords and generated names are never saved or sent to any server.

number-generator.question: What types of numbers can I generate?
number-generator.answer: You can generate random numbers, lottery numbers, PIN codes, custom ranges, and number sequences with various output formats.

number-generator.question: Is the number generation truly random?
number-generator.answer: The generator uses cryptographically strong randomization via the Web Crypto API when available, providing high-quality random numbers.

number-generator.question: Can I set a custom range for numbers?
number-generator.answer: Yes, you can set minimum and maximum values to generate numbers within any custom range you need.

poetry-generator.question: What types of poems can I generate?
poetry-generator.answer: You can generate poems, haikus, sonnets, limericks, and rhyming verses with customizable themes and styles.

poetry-generator.question: How does the poetry generation work?
poetry-generator.answer: The generator uses pattern-based templates and rhyme detection to create poetic verses based on your chosen theme and style.

poetry-generator.question: Can I save or share my poems?
poetry-generator.answer: Yes, you can copy your generated poem to clipboard or download it as a text file to save or share anywhere.

instagram-bio-generator.question: How do I create an Instagram bio?
instagram-bio-generator.answer: Choose a style template, enter your details, pick fonts and emojis, and instantly preview your optimized Instagram bio.

instagram-bio-generator.question: Can I copy the bio directly?
instagram-bio-generator.answer: Yes, you can copy the generated bio to your clipboard with one click and paste it directly into Instagram.

instagram-bio-generator.question: Is my bio data private?
instagram-bio-generator.answer: Yes. All bio generation happens client-side in your browser. Nothing you type is saved or sent to any server.

image-color-picker-pro.question: How do I pick colors from an image?
image-color-picker-pro.answer: Upload an image and click anywhere on it to extract the exact color. The tool displays HEX, RGB, and HSL values instantly.

image-color-picker-pro.question: Can I copy color codes?
image-color-picker-pro.answer: Yes, you can copy any color code (HEX, RGB, or HSL) to your clipboard with a single click.

image-color-picker-pro.question: Is my image uploaded to a server?
image-color-picker-pro.answer: No. All color extraction happens client-side using Canvas API. Your image is processed entirely in your browser.

aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.question: What are the standard Aadhaar photo dimensions?
aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.answer: Aadhaar photos typically require 2x2 inch size with specific pixel dimensions. The tool automatically applies the correct dimensions for Aadhaar, PAN, and KYC forms.

aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.question: Can I resize both photos and signatures?
aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.answer: Yes, the tool supports resizing both photographs and signature images for various government application forms.

aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.question: Is my personal photo uploaded?
aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer.answer: No. All image resizing and compression happens locally in your browser. Your photos never leave your device.

flip-image.question: How do I flip an image?
flip-image.answer: Upload an image from your device, choose horizontal (mirror) or vertical flip direction, preview the result, and download the flipped image.

flip-image.question: What image formats are supported?
flip-image.answer: The tool supports JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, and BMP image formats for flipping operations.

flip-image.question: Is my image uploaded to a server?
flip-image.answer: No. All image processing is done locally in your browser using the Canvas API. Your image never leaves your device.

logo-generator.question: How do I create a custom logo with this tool?
logo-generator.answer: Simply type your brand name, choose a font style, pick colors, and customize the layout. All editing happens in your browser instantly with no signup required.

logo-generator.question: Can I download my logo in high resolution?
logo-generator.answer: Yes, you can download your logo as a PNG image. The logo is rendered at high resolution directly in your browser.

logo-generator.question: Is my logo data private?
logo-generator.answer: Absolutely. All logo creation and rendering happens 100% client-side in your browser. No text, colors, or design data is ever sent to our servers.

markdown-to-pdf.question: How do I convert Markdown to PDF?
markdown-to-pdf.answer: Type or paste your Markdown text into the editor, preview the formatted output, and click download to save as a PDF. All rendering happens locally.

markdown-to-pdf.question: Does it support images and tables in Markdown?
markdown-to-pdf.answer: Yes, the converter supports standard Markdown syntax including headings, lists, tables, code blocks, images, and links in the PDF output.

markdown-to-pdf.question: Is my Markdown data stored on your servers?
markdown-to-pdf.answer: No. Markdown to PDF conversion happens entirely in your browser. Your content never leaves your device.

word-frequency-counter.question: How does word frequency counting work?
word-frequency-counter.answer: Paste or type text and the tool analyzes every word, counting occurrences and displaying them sorted by frequency for easy text analysis.

word-frequency-counter.question: Can I exclude common words from analysis?
word-frequency-counter.answer: Yes, the tool can filter out stop words (the, and, a, etc.) to focus on meaningful keywords in your text analysis.

word-frequency-counter.question: Is my text data stored?
word-frequency-counter.answer: No. All text analysis is done locally in your browser. Your text never leaves your device.

pdf-metadata-editor.question: What PDF metadata can I edit?
pdf-metadata-editor.answer: You can edit standard PDF metadata fields including Title, Author, Subject, Keywords, Producer, and Creator information.

pdf-metadata-editor.question: How do I edit PDF metadata?
pdf-metadata-editor.answer: Upload your PDF file, edit the metadata fields in the form, and download the updated PDF with the new metadata embedded.

pdf-metadata-editor.question: Is my PDF file uploaded?
pdf-metadata-editor.answer: No. All metadata editing happens client-side in your browser using PDF.js. Your file never leaves your device.

pdf-to-word.question: How accurate is the PDF to Word conversion?
pdf-to-word.answer: The conversion extracts text content and basic formatting from PDFs. Text extraction is highly accurate for digital PDFs; scanned documents may require OCR (not included).

pdf-to-word.question: What output format does the tool produce?
pdf-to-word.answer: The tool generates editable Word documents (.docx format) that can be opened in Microsoft Word, Google Docs, or LibreOffice.

pdf-to-word.question: Is my PDF file stored on your servers?
pdf-to-word.answer: No. All conversion processing is done client-side using PDF.js. Your document never leaves your device.

pdf-unlocker.question: Can I remove any PDF password?
pdf-unlocker.answer: The tool can remove user-level password protection (restrictions on printing, editing, etc.) from PDFs. Owner-level passwords may not always be removable.

pdf-unlocker.question: How does PDF unlocking work?
pdf-unlocker.answer: Upload your password-protected PDF, enter the password if required, and the tool removes the restrictions by creating a new unlocked version.

pdf-unlocker.question: Is my PDF stored on your servers?
pdf-unlocker.answer: No. All PDF processing is done client-side using PDF.js. Your file never leaves your device.

pdf-tools.question: What PDF operations can I perform?
pdf-tools.answer: You can merge, split, compress, edit metadata, add watermarks, add page numbers, rotate pages, and unlock password-protected PDFs.

pdf-tools.question: Are my PDF files uploaded to a server?
pdf-tools.answer: No. All PDF processing is done 100% client-side using PDF.js and other browser-based libraries. Your files never leave your device.

pdf-tools.question: Is there a file size limit?
pdf-tools.answer: Since all processing is client-side, the limit depends on your device's memory and browser capabilities rather than our servers.

video-converter.question: What video formats are supported?
video-converter.answer: The converter supports MP4, AVI, MKV, MOV, WebM, OGG, and more common video formats for conversion.

video-converter.question: How does browser-based video conversion work?
video-converter.answer: The tool uses Canvas API and MediaRecorder to process video frames and re-encode them in the target format, all within your browser.

video-converter.question: Is there a file size limit?
video-converter.answer: Since processing is client-side, the limit depends on your device's memory and browser capabilities. Very large files may need a capable device.

text-to-speech.question: How does the text to speech tool work?
text-to-speech.answer: Type or paste text into the input box, choose a voice and speed, and click play. The tool uses your browser's built-in Web Speech API to generate natural-sounding speech.

text-to-speech.question: Can I download the speech as an audio file?
text-to-speech.answer: Yes, you can record and download the generated speech as an audio file directly from your browser.

text-to-speech.question: Is my text data sent to a server?
text-to-speech.answer: No. All speech synthesis happens locally using your browser's native speech engine. Your text never leaves your device.

json-to-yaml-converter.question: How do I convert JSON to YAML?
json-to-yaml-converter.answer: Paste your JSON into the input box and the conversion happens instantly. The tool automatically detects JSON format and outputs clean, properly indented YAML.

json-to-yaml-converter.question: Does the converter handle nested JSON objects?
json-to-yaml-converter.answer: Yes, it fully supports nested objects, arrays, and complex JSON structures, converting them to proper YAML with correct indentation.

json-to-yaml-converter.question: Is my JSON data uploaded to a server?
json-to-yaml-converter.answer: No. All conversion processing happens 100% client-side in your browser. Your data never leaves your device.

html-to-xml-entities.question: What are HTML entities?
html-to-xml-entities.answer: HTML entities are special character codes (like & for &) used to display reserved characters safely in HTML and XML documents.

html-to-xml-entities.question: How does the converter work?
html-to-xml-entities.answer: Paste your HTML text and the tool automatically converts special characters to their safe XML entity equivalents or decodes them back.

html-to-xml-entities.question: Is my data sent to a server?
html-to-xml-entities.answer: No. All conversion happens locally in your browser. Your code and text never leave your device.

people-data-labs-api-key-tester.question: How does the API tester work?
people-data-labs-api-key-tester.answer: Enter your People Data Labs API key and the tool tests it against the person enrichment endpoint directly from your browser to verify it's valid.

people-data-labs-api-key-tester.question: Is my API key stored?
people-data-labs-api-key-tester.answer: No. The key is used only for the test request and is never stored, logged, or transmitted to our servers.

people-data-labs-api-key-tester.question: What happens on a failed test?
people-data-labs-api-key-tester.answer: The tool displays the error response from the API so you can diagnose issues with your API key configuration.

pipedrive-api-key-tester.question: How does the API key tester work?
pipedrive-api-key-tester.answer: Enter your Pipedrive API token and the tool makes a test request to the deals endpoint directly from your browser to verify the token works.

pipedrive-api-key-tester.question: Is my API key stored or logged?
pipedrive-api-key-tester.answer: No. The API key is used only for the test request from your browser and is never stored, logged, or transmitted to our servers.

pipedrive-api-key-tester.question: What does a successful test look like?
pipedrive-api-key-tester.answer: A successful test shows a green status with the API response data. A failed test displays the error message to help you debug.

sparkpost-api-key-tester.question: How do I test my SparkPost API key?
sparkpost-api-key-tester.answer: Enter your SparkPost API key and the tool tests it against the transmissions endpoint to verify it has the correct permissions.

sparkpost-api-key-tester.question: Is my API key stored anywhere?
sparkpost-api-key-tester.answer: No. The API key is used exclusively for the test call from your browser and is never saved or transmitted to our servers.

sparkpost-api-key-tester.question: What does a successful response look like?
sparkpost-api-key-tester.answer: A successful test returns green status with transmission API details. Errors include descriptive messages to help troubleshoot.

utm-builder.question: What are UTM parameters?
utm-builder.answer: UTM parameters are tags added to URLs that help Google Analytics track where traffic comes from, including source, medium, campaign, and content.

utm-builder.question: How do I use the UTM builder?
utm-builder.answer: Enter your base URL, fill in the UTM fields (source, medium, campaign, etc.), and the tool generates a complete campaign URL ready to use.

utm-builder.question: Can I save my UTM campaigns?
utm-builder.answer: The generated URLs can be copied to clipboard or exported. URLs are not stored on servers — everything stays in your browser.

search.question: What can I search for on SopKit?
search.answer: You can search across 600+ free online tools organized in 19 categories including developer tools, image editors, PDF tools, calculators, and more.

search.question: How does the search work?
search.answer: Simply type keywords related to the tool you need and the search instantly filters through all tools by name, description, and category.

search.question: Are my searches private?
search.answer: Yes. Search happens entirely client-side. Your search queries are not tracked, logged, or sent to any analytics service.

ibps-photo-resizer.question: What are IBPS photo requirements?
ibps-photo-resizer.answer: IBPS bank exams require specific photo dimensions (typically 200x230 pixels) and file size limits. The tool auto-applies these specifications.

ibps-photo-resizer.question: Can I resize photos for other bank exams?
ibps-photo-resizer.answer: Yes, the tool supports photo resizing for IBPS, SBI, RBI, and other public sector bank exam applications.

ibps-photo-resizer.question: Is my photo stored anywhere?
ibps-photo-resizer.answer: No. All resizing is done locally in your browser. Your photo is never uploaded to any server.

bmr-calculator.question: What is BMR and why is it important?
bmr-calculator.answer: Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) is the number of calories your body needs at rest. It helps determine daily calorie needs for weight management and fitness planning.

bmr-calculator.question: How is BMR calculated?
bmr-calculator.answer: The calculator uses the Mifflin-St Jeor equation, which is the most accurate formula for estimating BMR based on age, gender, weight, and height.

bmr-calculator.question: Is my health data stored?
bmr-calculator.answer: No. All calculations are done locally in your browser. Your personal data is not stored, logged, or transmitted anywhere.
